case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. TAK L IAO

ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210010629) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT IAO, TAK L NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-28-2022
